title: Neema-Da-Boda
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Neema-Da-Boda |homeworld= |birth= |death=Before the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], [[Ottethan/Legends|Ottethan]]''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents=[[Vima-Da-Boda]] |partners=[[Ottethan warlord]][[Dark Empire endnotes|''Dark Empire'' endnotes]] |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |masters=[[Vima-Da-Boda]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Something ''terrible happened''. Jedi Vima trained her daughter, Neema, but ''failed'' her. Vima could not save little Neema from herself. From ''love''. From the dark side…''"
"''…From the jaws of the rancors.''"
"''Neema's beloved… fed her to them. But the tragedy was double. For little Neema ''was with child''. Then, Jedi Vima gave into her anger. She ''murdered'' in hatred for her child, and her child's child. And Vima failed her Jedi vow… and failed herself.|Vima-Da-Boda and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|{{StoryCite|story=Lone Wolf: A Tale of Obi-Wan and Luke|book=SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story}}}} '''Neema-Da-Boda''' was the daughter of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Vima-Da-Boda]] and the descendant of [[Andur Sunrider|Andur]] and [[Nomi Sunrider]]. ==Biography== Being [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Neema began to train as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] under her mother. But like many students, Neema became frustrated with the slow, careful style her mother had taken to using with her. Over time, Neema was consumed by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and she left her mother behind. She joined a group of other rebellious students, and eventually became the mistress of an [[Ottethan warlord]]. Years later, after Neema had been imprisoned in an [[Oubliette (stasis casket)|oubliette]] by her husband, she reached out through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], begging for her mother to come and help her. Vima was too late to save her daughter, who was fed to [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] by her husband, and [[Death/Legends|killed]] him in revenge. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Lone Wolf: A Tale of Obi-Wan and Luke|book=SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story}} {{Mo}} ==Sources== *[[Dark Empire endnotes|''Dark Empire'' endnotes]] {{C|Part 3: ''The Alliance is Finished!''}} {{1stm}} *''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *[[Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 3: ''Dark Empire'']] *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{FactFile|73|RAN 1-2|Rancors}} *{{FactFile|126|BOD 1-2|Vima-Da-Boda}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Neema}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Neema-Da-Boda |es=Neema-Da-Boda }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Da-Boda, Neema}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Redeemed Jedi]]
